baseline: v1 pilot (experiments/2026-05-08-001-wc-10-pilot/results.csv) provides n=20 paired (wc_10 + 5tier_baseline) baseline. v2 adds 80 unpaired WC-10 datapoints. Combined WC-10 cohort at analysis time: n=100 across 8 tickers.
notes: v2 ticker-expansion grid: 8 tickers × 10 weekly-Friday dates (Q1 2026) × 1 mode (WC-10 only) = 80 propagates. ~$32 LLM (T2-boundary; cost overshoot deliberated in HYPOTHESIS.md per Constitution III escape hatch). Primary metric: SC-005(b) signed-rating × 21d-α correlation at n=100 (critical r ~ 0.197 at p=0.05). Secondary: ALT-A generalization across 6 new tickers. Tertiary: per-bucket realized α generalization beyond NVDA.
